name: @theoplayer/web-ui-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the THEOplayer Open Video UI for Web

scripts.start: cd docs && bundle exec jekyll serve --host localhost --force_polling
scripts.version: npm run version:changelog && npm run version:deps && npm run version:react
scripts.version:changelog: node scripts/bump-changelog.mjs CHANGELOG.md && git add CHANGELOG.md
scripts.version:deps: cross-env-shell "npm install $npm_package_name@$npm_package_version --workspace packages/react-ui && git add packages/react-ui/package.json"
scripts.version:react: cross-env-shell "npm version $npm_package_version --workspace packages/react-ui --no-git-tag-version && git add packages/react-ui/package.json"

author: THEO Technologies
